title: stelis pauxilla
intro: Stelis pauxilla is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis pauxilla include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or extract form for its medicinal properties.
